title: Eliza's Guacamole
description: Fresh, easy, authentic guacamole with avocado, onion, Roma tomato, cilantro, jalapeño, garlic, and lime.
instructions: Slice the avocados in half, remove the pit, and scoop into a mixing bowl.
Mash the avocado with a fork and make it as chunky or smooth as you'd like.
Add the remaining ingredients and stir together. Taste and add a pinch more salt or lime juice if needed.
Serve the guacamole with tortilla chips.

notes.text: Look for large avocados; if you can only find small ones, add an extra.
Use fresh limes rather than bottled juice — the flavor difference is worth it.

nutrition: Calories: 184.8kcal | Carbohydrates: 12.3g | Protein: 2.5g | Fat: 15.8g | Saturated Fat: 2.2g | Sodium: 305.5mg | Fiber: 7.6g | Sugar: 1.7g
